summary: Iteration 113 - Messaging Contacts Fix Testing COMPLETE. All 16 backend tests passed. Frontend verified: contacts loading correctly for cooperative role (7 contacts: 3 agents + 3 farmers + 1 other), conversations display, message sending works.
critical_code_review_comments: Fix verified: messaging.py contacts endpoint now correctly uses 'user_id' field instead of 'member_id' for coop_members queries
Cooperative role: Can see field_agent (3) + producteur (3) contacts = 6 total
Field Agent role: Can see cooperative (1) + producteur (3) contacts = 4 total
Farmer role: Can see cooperative (13) contacts
seed_data_creation: Test messages created with TEST_ prefix during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Messaging contacts fix verified. The key fix was changing 'member_id' to 'user_id' in coop_members queries in messaging.py. Contacts now load correctly for all roles (cooperative, field_agent, producteur). Rate limiter is in-memory - restart backend if blocked after 5 failed login attempts.

backend_apis: POST /api/auth/login - PASSED: All 4 roles (cooperative, agent, farmer, admin)
GET /api/messaging/contacts (cooperative) - PASSED: Returns 6 contacts (3 agents + 3 farmers)
GET /api/messaging/contacts (field_agent) - PASSED: Returns 4 contacts (1 coop + 3 farmers)
GET /api/messaging/conversations/{id} - PASSED: Returns conversation detail with other_user info
frontend_ui: Messaging page loads with sidebar - PASSED
Conversations display in sidebar (4 conversations) - PASSED
New conversation button opens dialog - PASSED
Contacts load in dialog (7 contacts visible) - PASSED
Contact types shown: Agent Terrain, Agriculteur - PASSED
Click conversation opens chat view - PASSED

fix_verification.issue: Contacts query in messaging.py was using 'member_id' field which doesn't exist in coop_members collection
fix_verification.fix: Changed 'member_id' to 'user_id' for coop_members queries across cooperative, field_agent, and producteur roles
fix_verification.result: Contacts now load correctly for all roles
fix_verification.before_fix: Agents saw 0 contacts, cooperatives missed farmer members, farmers couldn't find cooperative membership
fix_verification.after_fix: Cooperative sees 6 contacts, Agent sees 4 contacts, Farmer sees 13 contacts
